text.title: Provider Deprecation Runbook Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the provider-deprecation-runbook artefact + run-record.

list.item: side-effect step without rollback or stop_branch (rule r2)
owner forbidden value or on_call empty (rule r5)

example.note: owner=team (f4); on_call empty (f4); deprecation_date not ISO; phase missing budget_min (f3); actor=someone (f2); step without rollback or stop_branch (f1).
